name: Charley
title: Acting Chair
text: Charley has been involved with Pride in Sligo since 2019 and works alongside members of the LGBTQI+ community with Full Spectrum Ireland and 8 Rays Leitrim. It is their job to help keep us all on point and work as both the face of Leitrim Pride and the Festival Director.

name: Niall
title: Acting Secratary
text: Niall is also a member of Full Spectrum Ireland and 8 Rays Leitrim. Niall will be on hand to run through the paperwork and help manage emails and any correspondence.

name: Marty
title: Acting Treasurer
text: Since 2004 Marty has been involved as a committee member of OutWest, a social and support group for the LGBT+ community in the West of Ireland. Since 2006, he has been a volunteer on the Outwest LGBT+ Helpline, of which he is the current Coordinator. He was involved in the setting up of the National LGBT+ Helpline, which was launched in 2010. Marty is also a board member of LGBT Ireland.

name: Isolde
text: Isolde is an artist and activist who works for the rights of LGBTI+ people, disabled people and women / gender minorities using a community-building approach. She is a volunteer with Leitrim Pride and co-founded Full Spectrum Ireland, a unique grass-roots network for disabled LGBTI+ people.
